features: Experience the beauty of Sugarplum, enhanced with exotic fruit notes that spread throughout your room for a rich, lasting fragrance.
description: Discover the Room & Bathroom Air Freshener – Christmas Sugarplum Delight Enjoy the festive fragrance of Sugarplum Delight, enriched with exotic fruit notes that travel through the room, leaving it beautifully scented. With a simple push of the trigger, this light mist lets you control the amount of fragrance released. Unlike traditional air fresheners, Febreze Air Mist uses a 100% natural nitrogen propellant, working to eliminate odours from the air rather than just masking them. Perfect for use throughout your home, this spray helps keep every room smelling fresh, clean, and ready for the season.
